sections.paragraph:
αἰκισμός, οῦ, ὁ (since Ctesias [400 b.c.]; Pollux 8, 79; pap, LXX; Just., A II, 12, 4) mistreatment (PHal 1, 118 [III b.c.]; 2 and 4 Macc) (w. κόλασις) punishment (Plut., Mor. 8f) εἰς αἰ. τιθέναι=αἰκίζειν punish 1 Cl 11:1.—Frisk s.v. ἀϊκής.

Ctesias Ctesias , V–IVb.c.—List 5

Pollux Pollux , II a.d.—List 5

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

PHal PHal = Dikaiomata: in a papyrus published by the Graeca Halensis—List 4

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

Frisk Frisk = HF., Griechisches etymologisches Wörterbuch—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 26
